title: Missing 'crypto' module in self-hosted n8n
symptom: When trying to execute a function that requires the 'crypto' module, n8n throws an error stating 'Cannot find module 'crypto'.
applies_when: Attempting to use built-in crypto functions
not_this_if: Running n8n in a cloud environment without custom configurations
root_cause: The 'crypto' module is a built-in Node.js module that needs to be explicitly allowed in the n8n environment settings for self-hosted instances. If not configured, n8n will not recognize it, leading to the module not found error.
fix_steps: Access your n8n instance in Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
Stop the running Docker container for n8n.

Restart the container with the following command, ensuring to include the environment variables: -e N8N_ENABLE_RAW_EXECUTION=true -e NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=crypto -e NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_EXTERNAL=''
agent_instruction: Add the necessary environment variables to your n8n Docker container and restart it.
